case_title: LUCIA QUIJADA VS. COSKUN BEKTAS et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF QUIJADA, LUCIA

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF LUCIA QUIJADA'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER, AND TURNOVER ORDER TO AND ON BEHALF OF THE SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF, ATTN: CIVIL DIVISION, CITY HALL, ROOM 456, 1 DR. CARLTON B. GOODLETT PLACE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,679.99. THE JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED MAY 7, 2010. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE DONALD J. SULLIVAN. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED.
